text: وَ مَا ذٰلِکَ‌ عَلَى‌ اللَّهِ‌ بِعَزِيزٍ

en.ahmedali: This is well within the power of God.
en.ahmedraza: And this not at all difficult for Allah.
en.arberry: that is surely no great matter for God.
en.daryabadi: And with Allah that shall not be hard.
en.hilali: And that is not hard for Allah.
en.itani: And that would not be difficult for God.
en.maududi: That surely is not difficult for Allah.
en.mubarakpuri: And that is not hard for Allah.
en.pickthall: That is not a hard thing for Allah.
en.qarai: and that is not a hard thing for Allah.
en.qaribullah: this is not a great matter for Allah.
en.sahih: And that is for Allah not difficult.
en.sarwar: This would not cost God dear at all.
en.shakir: And this is not hard to Allah.
en.wahiduddin: that is not difficult for God.
en.yusufali: Nor is that (at all) difficult for Allah.
fa.ansarian: و این کار بر خدا دشوار نیست،
fa.ayati: و اين كار بر خدا دشوار نيست.
fa.bahrampour: و اين [امر] براى خدا دشوار نيست
fa.fooladvand: و اين [امر] براى خدا دشوار نيست.
fa.ghomshei: و هیچ این کار بر خدا دشوار نیست.
fa.khorramdel: و این کار برای خدا مشکل و سنگین نیست. [[«عَزِیزٍ»: صعب و سخت. مشکل و پرمشقّت (نگا: توبه / 128، هود / 91، ابراهیم / 20).]]
fa.khorramshahi: و این امر بر خداوند دشوار نیست‌
fa.makarem: و این برای خداوند مشکل نیست!
fa.moezzi: و نیست آن بر خدا گران‌
fa.mojtabavi: و اين كار بر خداى دشوار نيست.
fa.sadeqi: و این (امر مهمّ) برای خدا دشوار نیست.
